title: Rhythm: long paragraph
description: Multi-sentence paragraph at high WPM — sustained tempo
text: The team worked late into the evening. Every screen glowed, every keyboard clicked. By eight o'clock, the bug was fixed, the tests were passing, and the new feature was ready to ship. Someone ordered pizza. The week was finally over.

tips.text: Real prose has multiple sentences in flow
Periods are tempo breaks, not full stops — barely a pause

tips.target: The team worked late into the evening. Every screen glowed, every keyboard clicked. By eight o'clock, the bug was fixed,

tips.text: Enable metronome at 67 BPM — hold the tempo across all sentences

tips.target: the tests were passing, and the new feature was ready to ship. Someone ordered pizza. The week was finally over.

character_tips.anna: Multi-sentence rhythm is real-world writing speed. Hold the tempo.
character_tips.maxim: Each period is a beat, not a stop. Keep the flow.
character_tips.knopych: FULL PARAGRAPH FLOW! 🌊 Don't let it dip!
character_tips.klavochka: Like a song with many verses, my sunshine 🎵
